node.text: Dave finds fixing cars like therapy and feels fulfilled by refurbishing them, stemming from working on cars with his dad.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "childhood garage father") on Session 12 (Score: 1.00)

node.text: Dave has fond memories of restoring an old car with his dad during one summer, finding it hard work but satisfying.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "childhood garage father") on Session 12 (Score: 1.00)

node.text: Dave started working on cars at the age of ten after finding an old car in a neighbor's garage.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "childhood garage father") on Session 25 (Score: 0.76)

node.text: Dave helped his neighbor fix a car engine which he found a therapeutic and relaxing experience.

node.text: Dave finds working on cars to be cathartic and a way to connect back with himself.

node.text: Dave finds working on cars therapeutic and relaxing, particularly restoring an old Ford Mustang found in a junkyard.

node.text: Dave's hands are permanently stained with grease from working on cars, showing his dedication and hard work.

node.text: Dave restored a car last year but sold it to a collector and is currently working on a new project.
